title: ED can initiate civil action even without predicate offence: Kerala High Court refuses to quash PMLA probe against CMRL
description: A Division Bench of the Kerala High Court on Friday refused to quash the Enforcement Directorate's (ED's) investigation into Cochin Minerals and Rutile Limited (CMRL) [M/S Cochin Minerals and Rutile Limited & Ors. v. Directorate of Enforcement].The Bench of Justices Raja Vijayaraghavan V and KV Jayakumar passed the order on an appeal filed by the CMRL challenging a single-judge's refusal to quash the ED's investigation into its activities.The Court turned down CMRL's argument that regis
